summary: Tested authentic tariff APIs and frontend Calculator. Backend: 20/20 tests PASSED - all /api/authentic-tariffs/* endpoints working correctly with 49 countries. Frontend: Critical bug found - Calculator button click does NOT trigger API call due to Select component state mismatch.

ui_bugs.issue: Country Select components show visual selection but React state remains empty. When clicking Calculate button, validateTariff() fails silently because originCountry/destinationCountry state values are empty strings despite UI showing selected countries.

integration_issues.issue: Form displays correctly with all fields filled (Origin, Destination, HS Code, Value) but clicking 'Calculer avec Données Officielles' does not trigger /api/authentic-tariffs/calculate API call. The onClick handler is called but validation fails due to state issue.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Debug why Select component's onValueChange is not updating React state (originCountry, destinationCountry)
VERIFY: Check if countries prop is passed correctly to CalculatorTab component
CHECK: Ensure Select components are properly controlled (value={} with onValueChange={})
TEST: Add console.log in calculateTariff to debug which validation condition fails
critical_code_review_comments: Select component state sync issue - UI shows selection but state is empty
No visual feedback when Calculate button click fails validation silently
Consider adding data-testid to Select triggers for easier testing
seed_data_creation: N/A - Using 49 authentic JSON tariff files in /app/backend/data/
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend authentic tariff APIs are fully working. Frontend Calculator has critical bug where Select components don't properly update React state. The visual UI shows selections but state variables (originCountry, destinationCountry) remain empty strings. Manual onClick trigger was attempted and function was called but API request was not made because validation failed. Fix: Debug Select component state binding in CalculatorTab.jsx lines 54-55 (useState for originCountry/destinationCountry) and lines 478-506 (Select components).

working: GET /api/authentic-tariffs/calculate/{country}/{hs_code} - Returns NPF vs ZLECAf calculation
not_tested_frontend: Calculator UI - Form fills but Calculate button does not trigger API due to state bug

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: Calculator button click does not produce results
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: React Select component onValueChange callback not properly updating state. The UI displays selected country but internal state remains empty string.
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: 1. props.onClick() was successfully called. 2. No API request made to /api/authentic-tariffs/calculate. 3. Select button text shows '🇩🇿 Algérie' but value attr is 'no-attr'. 4. calculateTariff() has validation on line 241 that checks if(!originCountry || !destinationCountry...) which fails.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction_steps: 1. Navigate to Calculator tab. 2. Select origin country (Algérie). 3. Select destination country (CAF). 4. Enter HS code 180100. 5. Enter value 50000. 6. Click Calculate button. 7. Observe: no results appear, no API call made.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Debug Select component binding. Check if countries prop is properly passed. Verify onValueChange={setOriginCountry} is correctly wired.
